mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.sort AS "sort", a.no AS "no", a.country AS "country", a.ext AS "ext", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_quhao( id, sort, no, country, ext, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{sort}, #{no}, #{country}, #{ext}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_quhao SET sort = #{sort}, no = #{no}, country = #{country}, ext = #{ext}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
